cicd_pipelines_chapter:
## What You Will Learn

In this chapter, you will master the fundamentals of CI/CD pipelines, including continuous integration, continuous delivery, and deployment automation. You will learn how to build, test, and deploy code reliably and efficiently.

### Key Concepts
- Core concepts and syntax for this chapter
- Practical implementation patterns
- Common pitfalls and best practices

### Why This Matters
CI/CD skills are essential for delivering software quickly, safely, and at scale in modern DevOps practices.
